name: nutria
description: NutrIA - Nutrition Tracking App with AI Chatbot

scripts.dev: npm -w backend run dev & npm -w frontend run start
scripts.build: npm -w backend run build && npm -w frontend run build
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules build dist
scripts.render:build: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm -w backend run db:migrate && npm -w backend run db:seed && npm -w backend run build

author: Fernando Henriques
